active_evidence_residuals.reentry_condition: Register authenticated original logs and bind their content identities before changing this boundary.
active_evidence_residuals.statement: The original mutation run logs are not registered; historical timings remain a structured transcription.

active_evidence_residuals.reentry_condition: Recover and authenticate an original target before marking another operator exact.
active_evidence_residuals.statement: Only the explicitly named mutation operators preserve exact original targets; the remaining targets are deterministic reconstructions.

active_evidence_residuals.reentry_condition: Keep later deterministic reconstructions separate from the historical result unless the original experiment is rerun with equivalent targets and archived logs.
active_evidence_residuals.statement: The historical study did not rerun the other nine mutations after the M8 repair.

mutations.description: Status upgraded from conditional reduction to proved here.
README open-boundary clause does not solve was deleted.
A declaration coordinate was drifted by 40 lines.
A paper source link was retargeted by 50 lines.
One claim was placed in two contribution families.
The corpus descriptor module count was hand-edited by one.
native_decide was introduced into a proof.
A finite-evidence boundary clause was strengthened from does not supply to completes.
An authored open-problem anchor title was mangled.
The orientation surface was padded past its byte budget.

post_repair.claim_ceiling: The repaired checker rejects M8. No post-repair ten-of-ten result is reported.
post_repair.repair: The M8 boundary clause became a declared anchor group with a derived rejection fixture.

five_sentence_summary: Lean checks formal declarations and proofs, not every natural-language sentence that later describes them.
This repository records mathematical claim status, source coordinates, publication artifacts, and declared release invariants in machine-readable owners.
At evaluation checkpoint 0e5aaf9, the release gate rejected nine of ten authored corruptions and allowed M8, which strengthened a finite-evidence boundary into a false unbounded claim.
After that sentence became a declared boundary with a negative fixture, the same M8 corruption was rejected.
A green release gate means the declared checks passed; it does not mean the system understood arbitrary prose or proved that its invariant family is complete.
known_limitations: The mutation author and checker author were the same person.
Five of seven invariant families were exercised by exactly one mutation.
The study covers one corpus, one maintainer, and one working style.
There was no controlled comparison with ordinary continuous integration or disciplined manual review.
Reader error and transfer to other corpora were not measured.

explicitly_not_claimed: The release gate understands arbitrary prose.
public_claims.statement: The declared publication invariants were executable on this corpus at the recorded evaluation checkpoint.

explicitly_not_claimed: This is a controlled comparison with ordinary continuous integration.
The mutation author was independent of the checker author.
public_claims.statement: The release gate rejected nine of ten authored corruptions at the evaluation checkpoint.

explicitly_not_claimed: The system can infer every semantically important sentence automatically.
public_claims.statement: M8 passed because the strengthened sentence was outside the declared boundary set.

explicitly_not_claimed: The original ten-mutation study was rerun in full after the repair.
A post-repair ten-of-ten historical result exists.
public_claims.statement: After the boundary was declared, the intact baseline passed and the same M8 corruption was rejected.

publication_non_claims: The release gate does not semantically understand arbitrary prose.
The invariant family and status taxonomy are not proved complete.
There is no controlled comparison with ordinary continuous integration or disciplined manual review.
Byte budgets are not claimed to cause comprehension.
Transfer beyond this corpus has not been demonstrated.
Porting and maintenance cost beyond recorded implementation size and runtime has not been measured.
Lean acceptance alone does not prove that a formal statement matches the intended informal mathematics.

registered_mathematical_non_claims.meaning: This release does not settle the universal Erdős #257 problem
This release does not settle Erdős #249
This release does not itself constitute a peer-reviewed publication record
This release is not asserted to be equivalent to any private development
Provider or model output is not proof authority; only the Lean kernel check is
No unpublished proof sketch or hidden artefact carries proof authority for this release

remaining_open_propositions.statement: Prove that S = ∑ φ(n)/2ⁿ is irrational, with no bound on a possible rational denominator.
Produce certified non-integrality witnesses at unbounded parameters. A sufficient one-parameter form is to produce them along the lcm diagonal.
Decide whether 1/2 lies in the Mersenne achievement set. Yes refutes universal #257; no closes only this route.
Prove irrationality for every infinite support A, not only the named support families formalised here.

revision_and_identity.revision_embedding_boundary: A tracked file cannot contain its own Git commit id without self-reference. Content freshness is enforced by the owner hashes below; agents query the checkout revision at runtime.

thesis: A proof assistant checks the formal theorem, but people and AI agents read papers and summaries; this project records the strength of each public claim and checks declared properties of published retellings against that record before release.
